zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury於1220年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾諾波利時，他的父親John FitzHerbert11217歲，母親Emmeline de Grendon46歲。他於大約1243年與Emeline de grendon在英國英格蘭德比夏爾諾波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1274年在他的家鄉享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury was born in 1220, in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John FitzHerbert, was 11217 and his mother, Emmeline de Grendon, was 46. He married Emeline de grendon about 1243, in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1274, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury est né en 1220, à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John FitzHerbert, avait 11217 ans et sa mère, Emmeline de Grendon, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Emeline de grendon environ 1243, à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1274, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

Er hat um 1243 in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Emeline de grendon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1274 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury è nato il nel 1220 nel Norbury, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John FitzHerbert, aveva 11217 anni e il suo madre, Emmeline de Grendon, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Emeline de grendon circa 1243, nel Norbury, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1274, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ko.Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire, England: 영국 더비실르 버턴 업 트렌트 스트 모드웬
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury(이)가 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John FitzHerbert(은)는 11217세였고, 그의 어머니 Emmeline de Grendon(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1243년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 노르버이에서 Emeline de grendon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1274년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury nasceu em 1220, em Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John FitzHerbert, tinha 11217 anos e sua mãe, Emmeline de Grendon, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Emeline de grendon aproximadamente 1243, em Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William FitzHerbert - Fifth Lord of Norbury родился в 1220 г. в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John FitzHerbert было 11217 лет, а матери, которую звали Emmeline de Grendon, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Emeline de grendon около 1243 г. в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1274 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
